name: Virtual Slippers
desc: Cozy, but digital. Left one only.

name: Mystery Key
desc: You no longer remember which lock.

name: Incorrect Map
desc: All roads lead to a swamp.

name: Instruction Manual
desc: For an appliance you don't own.

name: Pretty Leaf
lore: The walk was three years ago.

name: Spare Button
desc: Never matched anything. Not even close.

name: Foreign Coin
desc: From a country that no longer exists.

name: Broken Crayon
lore: It broke at a critical moment.

name: Expired Warranty
lore: It was never going to help you.

name: Random Dial
desc: No one knows what it controls.

name: Glass Marble
desc: Sees the future. Won't say what it sees.

name: Cassette Tape
lore: The music lives on in theory.

name: Perished Rubber Band
desc: Snaps if you even look at it.
lore: Its elasticity was consumed long ago.

name: Thumbtack
lore: Ready for a purpose it will never have.

name: Pencil Stub
desc: Too short to hold, too long to discard.

name: Dried Flower
lore: It pressed itself flat to survive.

name: Old Takeaway Menu
desc: The restaurant is gone. The menu survives.

name: Stretched Hair Tie
desc: Has forgotten how to be tight.

name: Candle Stub
desc: Too short to light, too big to ignore.

name: Broken Watch
lore: Technically still functional by that logic.

name: Dead Pen
desc: Ran out at the worst possible moment.
lore: It is a monument to poor timing.

name: Twist Tie
desc: Freed from its bread bag. Now lost.

name: Mystery Screw
desc: Left over from the last assembly. Ominous.
lore: Something is held together without it.

name: Empty Keyring
lore: Full of potential. Empty of keys.

name: Single Clothespeg
desc: Its partner was lost to the washing machine.

name: Wrong Charger
lore: It came from somewhere. It fits nothing.

name: Used Tea Bag
desc: Slightly damp. Still in a pocket.
lore: One more brew had seemed possible.

name: Empty Matchbox
desc: All matches gone. Striker worn to nothing.

name: Bottle Cap
desc: The prize of a long-gone bottle.

name: Odd Sock
desc: Where did the other one go?

name: Blank Sticky Note
desc: The important thought was never written down.
lore: The adhesive is mostly gone too.

name: Lost Die
desc: From a set of six. Now one.

name: Worn Toothbrush
desc: The bristles splay in all directions.

name: Broken Glasses
desc: One arm missing. Still in the drawer.

name: Orphaned Jar Lid
desc: No jar to be found. Just the lid.

name: Fortune Cookie Slip
desc: "Good things come to those who wait."

name: Pen Lid
desc: The pen is long gone. The lid persists.

name: Old Phone Case
lore: Kept in case the phone returns.

name: Dead Succulent
lore: The pot is a monument to optimism.

name: Tangled Earphones
desc: Become more tangled when left alone.

name: 2017 Calendar
desc: The pictures are nice, at least.

name: Straw Wrapper
desc: The straw already went into the cup.

name: Ketchup Sachet
desc: Pocketed from the chippy. Still there.

name: Lolly Stick
desc: Checked for a prize. No prize.
lore: One in a million. Not this one.

name: Empty Pistachio Shell
desc: The pistachio is gone. The shell remains.

name: Lonely Teaspoon
lore: It wanders the cutlery drawer alone.

name: Wine Cork
desc: Saved for a project. Project never started.
lore: One of seventeen corks in a bag.

name: Forgotten Sugar Cube
desc: Found at the back of a drawer.
lore: Awaiting a cup that never came.

name: Worn Eraser
desc: More smudge than erase at this point.

name: Broken Ruler
lore: Half a ruler. Half the answers.

name: Loose Staples
lore: A handful of tiny metal intentions.

name: Dried Highlighter
lore: A very specific shade of yellow regret.

name: Someone's Business Card
desc: You don't know this person anymore.

name: Old Nameplate
lore: The name was never filled in.

name: Empty Ink Cartridge
desc: Ink: zero. Cost to replace: somehow £40.
lore: The printer smiled as it died.

name: Blank CD-R
desc: Burned with something in 2004. Unknown what.
lore: The data expired with the drive.

name: TV Remote (Dead)
lore: Pointed at televisions that no longer exist.

name: Dead Earbuds
desc: One ear works. One ear is optimistic.

name: Trackball Mouse Ball
desc: From a mouse made before you were born.

name: Old SIM Card
lore: The contacts are gone but not forgotten.

name: Film Negative Strip
desc: Undeveloped or already developed. Impossible to say.

name: Undeveloped Camera Roll
lore: Contains the secret contents of a past holiday.

name: SCART Cable
desc: Somehow still heavier than a TV.

name: Dead Power Bank
lore: The phones it saved are also dead now.

name: Solar Calculator
desc: Works in sunlight. You are inside.

name: Pager
lore: The network is gone. The beeping remains.

name: Unknown Game Cartridge
desc: No console. No label. Infinite mystery.
lore: Contains a childhood someone once had.

name: Broken Joystick
desc: Left only. Right does not respond.

name: Odd Glove
lore: The right glove is out there somewhere.

name: Scratched Sunglasses
desc: Blocks 40% of UV and 100% of clarity.

name: Out-of-Fashion Tie
desc: The pattern was cutting edge. Once.
lore: Fashion is a circle. This tie is waiting.

name: Novelty Christmas Socks
lore: The snowmen are faded but spirited.

name: Swim Cap
desc: Smells of chlorine. Has for years.

name: Broken Flip Flop
desc: The thong has separated from the sole.

name: Event Wristband
desc: From an event years ago. Refuses to come off.
lore: The event: forgotten. The wristband: permanent.

name: Novelty Lapel Pin
desc: Shaped like something you can't identify.
lore: It was funny at the time.

name: Broken Friendship Bracelet
desc: The friendship may also be broken. Unknown.

name: Toe Ring
desc: Which toe? None of your toes.

name: Worn Belt
desc: Extra hole punched in the wrong place.

name: Worn Ballet Slipper
desc: The sole is through. The spirit remains.

name: Coverless Book
lore: Someone ripped the cover off deliberately.

name: Old Magazine
desc: Celebrity news from a previous decade.

name: Old Cinema Ticket
lore: The film has since won awards.

name: Vinyl Single
lore: Something good might be on side B.

name: Folded Tourist Map
lore: The city has changed since printing.

name: Museum Leaflet
desc: The museum closed two years ago.
lore: The exhibits live on in pamphlet form.

name: Torn Setlist
lore: The second half remains a mystery.

name: Sheet Music
desc: For an instrument you don't play.

name: TV Guide (Christmas 1990)
lore: A window into another era of television.

name: Pressed Flower
desc: From an unknown book. From an unknown walk.

name: Random Trading Card
lore: Collected in hope. Retained in inertia.

name: Regional Phone Book
desc: Nobody listed has this number anymore.
lore: An archive of a lost age.

name: Mystery Hex Key
lore: It came with something. That something is gone.

name: Stripped Screw
desc: No screwdriver can help it now.

name: Used Sandpaper
lore: It gave its roughness for something.

name: Masking Tape Core
desc: The tape is gone. The cardboard persists.
lore: Contains a perfect circle of nothing.

name: Single Cable Tie
desc: For one cable. No cable specified.

name: Blown Fuse
lore: A small hero. A small martyr.

name: Lone Jigsaw Piece
lore: This piece is the last survivor.

name: Monopoly Hotel
desc: Mayfair awaits. Mayfair is not here.

name: Extra Chess Pawn
desc: A spare. No set claims it.

name: Joker Card
desc: Wild. Unwanted. Always in the deck.

name: Lone LEGO Brick
desc: Compatible with a billion others. Alone.

name: Action Figure Arm
lore: The body waged war without it.

name: Toy Car Wheel
desc: Three-wheeled car somewhere. This is the fourth.
lore: The car retired. The wheel endures.

name: Cracked Frisbee
lore: Flies erratically. Lands in a hedge.

name: Old Arcade Token
desc: The arcade is a car park now.

name: Dead Tamagotchi
desc: It needed you. You were not there.
lore: RIP. The pet died so you could live.

name: Pine Cone
desc: A natural weather station nobody checks.

name: Found Feather
lore: It floated down and was immediately pocketed.

name: Blue Sea Glass
desc: Once a bottle. Now a treasure.
lore: Smoothed by the sea into something worth keeping.

name: Small Fossil
desc: Something died here, a long time ago.

name: Piece of Driftwood
desc: Carried by the sea to this pocket.

name: Quartz Crystal
desc: Vibrates at a frequency. You can't hear it.

name: Obsidian Shard
lore: Born in fire. Found on eBay.

name: Dried Starfish
lore: Once regenerated limbs. Now just desiccated.

name: Coral Fragment
desc: Pale. Delicate. Removed from the sea.
lore: It was alive. Then it wasn't.

name: Dried Rose Petal
desc: From a rose that is otherwise gone.
lore: Kept in a book. Still faintly pink.

name: Cinnamon Stick Fragment
desc: Already been scraped into hot milk once.

name: Star Anise
lore: Found at the back of the spice rack.

name: Empty Plaster Wrapper
lore: Kept in the hope of more plasters nearby.

name: Cotton Bud
lore: Ready for an ear it will never meet.

name: Expired Sunscreen
lore: The sun waits for no expiry date.

name: Novelty Eye Patch
desc: One eye: covered. Depth perception: gone.
lore: Piracy is a lifestyle, not a choice.

name: Chalky Antacid Tablet
lore: Taken in hope. Dissolved in futility.

name: Airline Luggage Tag
lore: A record of a journey survived.

name: Old Boarding Pass
lore: The flight landed. That's what matters.

name: Expired Bus Pass
desc: Valid until: a date that has passed.
lore: The bus still runs. This pass does not.

name: Metro Token
desc: From a city with a different currency now.
lore: A small disk from another world.

name: Luggage Lock
lore: Secure until the code was forgotten.

name: Deflated Neck Pillow
desc: Offers the suggestion of neck support.
lore: Inflated on boarding. Deflated by turbulence.

name: Hotel Key Card
lore: Opens a room in the past.

name: Hotel Shampoo Sachet
desc: Half a wash worth of shampoo.

name: Hotel Shower Cap
lore: A cap for a shower you no longer have.

name: Hotel Sewing Kit
desc: Three threads. One needle. Infinite hope.
lore: Has never been used in the field.

name: Wrong Country Adapter
desc: Works in a country you've never visited.
lore: Ready for a trip you haven't planned.

name: Phrasebook
desc: For a language you don't speak.
lore: Contains exactly one phrase you remember: 'where is the bank?'

name: Pealess Whistle
lore: The pea is gone. The volume is not.

name: Emergency Poncho
lore: Folded into a packet. Ready for a disaster.

name: Rubber Chicken
lore: Origin unknown. Purpose: unclear. Presence: unavoidable.

name: Pet Rock Certificate
desc: This certifies ownership of a rock.
lore: The rock has outlived the certificate.

name: Fortune Teller Fish
desc: Always curls the same way. Destiny: unclear.

name: Wind-Up Chattering Teeth
desc: Chatters and hops. No reason given.

name: Fake Dog Poo
lore: The joke landed. It has not left.

name: Mood Ring
desc: Turns blue. Always blue. Mood: unknown.
lore: Calibrated for a different set of emotions.

name: Disappearing Ink Pen
desc: The ink has disappeared. The pen has not.

name: Empty Snake-in-a-Can
desc: The snake has sprung. The can remains.
lore: The surprise is gone. The trauma lingers.

name: Souvenir Spoon
desc: Stamped with a skyline. Useless for soup.

name: Lenticular Postcard
lore: The technology is impressive. The images are not.

name: Novelty Ice Cube
desc: Contains a fake fly. Fools nobody.
lore: Gross in concept. Eternal in execution.

name: Magic Trick Ring
desc: The secret mechanism has been discovered.
lore: The trick is over. The ring is not.

name: Trick Bending Spoon
desc: Bends with a firm grip. Impresses nobody.
lore: Uri Geller did it with his mind. You need both hands.

name: Single Tarot Card
lore: The deck is elsewhere. This one stayed.

name: Mini Crystal Ball
desc: Reveals: a blurry version of the room.
lore: The future is unclear. The glass is cheap.

name: Rune Stone
lore: Purchased at a gift shop. Still ancient.

name: Evil Eye Charm
lore: Protection from malevolent forces and loose pockets.

name: Maneki-Neko Arm
desc: The cat is elsewhere. The arm beckons.

name: One-Eyed Daruma
lore: The second eye awaits a goal achieved.

name: Verdant Crown
desc: Worn by those who slew the Thornlord too many times.
lore: The thorns have given up resisting.

name: Iron Standard Badge
desc: Warlord Kragg is just not a problem for you.
lore: Proof of an absurd number of victories.

name: Ashen Shroud
desc: The Ashen Wastes hold no fear for you.
lore: A hundred walks through ash. Still standing.

name: Prism Lens Badge
desc: The Crystal Spire has been catalogued and defeated.
lore: Light bends for those who persist.

name: Golden Rubber Chicken
desc: You failed The Gambler so many times it became art.
lore: A trophy for persistence in failure.

name: Crumb of Greatness
lore: The greatness is not in this crumb.

name: Bottled Whisper
desc: Contains a secret. Tells no one.

name: The Last Pixel
lore: The screen is one pixel short without it.

name: Deleted Memory
desc: Something happened. You no longer know what.
lore: The data is gone. The gap remains.

name: Philosopher's Stone Chip
lore: Could theoretically turn lead to gold. Could.

name: Newton's Apple Pip
desc: From the apple. The actual apple.
lore: Gravity was discovered because of this pip's predecessor.

name: Rust from Excalibur
desc: The sword is legendary. The rust is less so.
lore: Only the worthy may hold the rust.

name: Meaning of Life (Post-It)
lore: The post-it has unstuck from the wall.

name: Unused Potential
lore: There was so much of it.

name: Blockbuster Video Card
lore: The last one in existence. Probably.

name: Imposter Syndrome Badge
lore: Awarded to everyone who felt they didn't belong.

name: Participation Trophy
lore: Turns out showing up was the hardest part.

name: Sunk Cost Coin
desc: Too invested to stop collecting junk.

name: Static Electricity (Jar)
desc: Do not open. Just trust us.
lore: Harvested from a wool jumper in 1987.

name: Frozen Moment in Time
lore: It will never be that nice again.

name: Bootstrap Paradox
desc: It was always here. You always had it.
lore: No one made it. It makes itself.

name: Void Lint
desc: From the pockets of the abyss.

name: Category Error
desc: This item is not an item.

name: Item Number 1000
lore: One thousand things that mean nothing. Together, everything.

name: Paper Straw Wrapper
desc: The eco-friendly wrapper for an eco-friendly straw.

name: Fortune Cookie Fortune
desc: "A surprise awaits you." It did not.

name: Conference Tote Bag
lore: The conference was unmemorable. The bag is not.

name: Paid Parking Fine
lore: A receipt for a very expensive mistake.

name: Half-Stamped Loyalty Card
desc: 5 of 10 stamps. The coffee shop closed.
lore: Halfway to a free coffee. Fully to disappointment.

name: Detached Gift Tag
lore: The gift has been given. The tag wanders.

name: Popped Bubble Wrap
lore: An entire afternoon of satisfaction. Gone.

name: Novelty Eraser
desc: Shaped like a hamburger. Erases like chalk.

name: Kinder Egg Capsule
desc: The toy has long since been lost.
lore: The chocolate was the point anyway.

name: Christmas Cracker Joke
desc: Q: Why did the... A: It doesn't matter.
lore: It was never funny. That was the point.

name: Used Glow Stick
desc: Glows no longer. Smells faintly chemical.
lore: It gave its all for three hours.

name: Single Piece of Confetti
lore: Found in a pocket a year later.

name: Christmas Tree Needle
lore: They outlast the tree by months.

name: Easter Egg Foil
desc: The egg is gone. The foil endures.

name: Used Greeting Card
desc: The sentiment has passed. The card has not.
lore: "Happy Birthday!" — signed by people you've lost touch with.

name: Broken Snow Globe
desc: The snow fell. It did not rise again.

name: Broken Magnifying Glass
desc: Handle detached. Lens remains. Barely useful.
lore: Magnifies the regret of dropping it.

name: Stray Abacus Bead
desc: The calculation will be off by one.

name: Small Tuning Fork
desc: A perfect A. No instrument to tune.

name: Metronome Pendulum
lore: The body is gone. The tempo lives on in theory.

name: Theremin Aerial
desc: Detached from the theremin. No longer eerie.
lore: Once it howled without being touched.

name: Orrery Planet Arm
desc: Mercury's arm, separated from the solar system.
lore: The model of the universe is incomplete.

name: Half a Leyden Jar
desc: Stored charge once. Stores nothing now.

name: Geiger Tube (Expired)
lore: Once detected radiation. Now detects silence.

name: Phlogiston Sample
desc: The element of combustion. Completely fictional.

name: Luminiferous Ether (Jar)
desc: The medium for light waves. Doesn't exist.
lore: Michelson-Morley disproved it. The jar remains.

name: Universal Solvent
lore: The container holding it should not exist.

name: Quintessence
lore: It was the Earth, Air, Fire, and Water all along.

name: Tyrian Purple Drop
desc: One drop. 10,000 murex snails per gram.
lore: An emperor's colour, democratised into junk.

name: Egyptian Blue Fragment
lore: Made for pharaohs. Found in a pocket.

name: Gold Leaf Fragment
desc: Genuine gold. Worth approximately nothing at this size.
lore: Beaten thin enough to be useless.

name: Painite Fragment
desc: One of the rarest minerals on Earth.
lore: In a game. In a pocket. Somehow.

name: Alexandrite Shard
desc: Green in daylight. Red at night.

name: Mystery Bag
lore: You are afraid to open it.

name: The First Light (Jar)
desc: Light from the beginning of everything.

name: Sound of Silence
lore: Simon and Garfunkel did not invent this.

name: The Last Laugh
lore: He who laughs last laughs alone in a bottle.

name: Placebo Pill
lore: The belief is doing the heavy lifting.

name: Missing Sock Explanation
desc: It explains everything. The note is indecipherable.

name: World's Okayest Mug
lore: Not the best. Not the worst. Comfortably average.

name: Warranty Void Sticker
desc: The warranty was voided. No regrets.
lore: Freedom from warranty is its own reward.

name: Complimentary Peanuts
lore: The saltiness endures as a memory.

name: Digital Ghost (USB)
desc: Haunted. Format does not resolve this.

name: Dunning-Kruger Trophy
desc: Awarded for supreme confidence in minimal knowledge.
lore: The winner was very confident in receiving it.

name: FoMO Ticket
desc: For an event that was probably fine.

name: YOLO Certificate
desc: Certifies that you only lived once.

name: 1st Place Ribbon (Reads 2nd)
desc: A clerical error in your favour.
lore: You chose to keep it anyway.

name: Moon Dust
lore: Purchased from a market stall. Confident provenance.

name: Bermuda Triangle Map
desc: Incomplete. Several ships may explain why.

name: Yeti Nail Clipping
lore: Cryptozoology requires a high tolerance for ambiguity.

name: Time Machine Manual
lore: The flux capacitor section is redacted.

name: Red Matrix Pill
desc: Reveals the truth. You're not ready.

name: Higgs Boson Receipt
desc: Purchased at the Large Hadron Collider gift shop.
lore: Not the actual Higgs Boson. Probably.

name: Schrödinger's Receipt
desc: May or may not exist until observed.

name: √(-1) Written on Paper
lore: i exists. The paper confirms it.

name: Last Tear Ever Shed
desc: This is it. No more crying after this.

name: Colour of the Wind (Jar)
desc: Faintly blue. Or was it green?

name: Weight of a Dream
lore: Carried everywhere. Costs nothing to keep.

name: End-of-Rainbow Coordinates
lore: The gold was not there. The coordinates are.

name: The First Emoji
desc: Drawn in 1999 on a tiny screen.

name: Da Vinci's Napkin Doodle
lore: He was thinking about wings again.

name: Lid of Pandora's Box
desc: The box is empty. Hope escaped.

name: Mothman Feather
desc: Large. Unsettling. Possibly from a heron.
lore: The bridge was fine. This time.

name: Loch Ness Monster Scale
desc: Green. Slightly wet. Probably a leaf.

name: Unidentifiable Object
desc: Shape: ambiguous. Material: unclear. Smell: faint.
lore: Passed down through generations. Nobody asks.

name: Cursed Coin
desc: Do not spend. Do not keep. Dilemma.

name: Mystery Bone
lore: Found on a walk. Kept out of respect.

name: Permanent Marker Lid
desc: The marker is gone. The cap endures.

name: Very Old Receipt
desc: Thermal paper. Ink: gone. Memory: vague.
lore: Something was purchased. That's all that remains.

name: Parking Disc
desc: Stuck at 2:15pm. Has been for years.
lore: Time stopped in a car park.

name: Novelty Fridge Magnet
desc: Shaped like a flag. Holds nothing to the fridge.

name: Padlock (No Key)
desc: Locked. The key is gone. So is the reason.
lore: Whatever it protected is long since unimportant.

name: Single Shoelace
desc: One shoe is now correctly tied.
lore: The other shoe has given up.

name: Museum Audio Guide Earpiece
desc: The audio is gone. The plastic remains.
lore: Once played commentary about Roman pottery.

name: Desk Fan (One Blade)
desc: Creates air movement in one direction only.

name: Used Heat Patch
desc: The heat was temporary. The patch is not.
lore: Adhered to a sock for three hours of warmth.

name: Deflated Gel Ice Pack
desc: Cold once. Tepid now. Flat always.
lore: For injuries that have since healed.

name: Emergency Foil Blanket
lore: Ready for emergencies that never came.

name: Single Toothpick
lore: Carried since a dinner three years ago.

name: Dried Correction Fluid
desc: The mistake was made. The correction failed.

name: Hole Punch Confetti
lore: From a document that no longer exists.

name: Broken Fountain Pen Nib
lore: A nib ruined by pressing too hard.

name: Wire Binding Strip
desc: From a notebook that fell apart.
lore: The pages scattered. The wire remained.

name: Wax Seal (Broken)
desc: The seal is broken. The correspondence opened.
lore: Whatever it sealed is now unseal-able.

name: Carbon Paper
desc: For duplicating. On a typewriter. In 1970.
lore: The original is gone. The copy remains.

name: Doorstop Wedge
lore: The door it once held has been removed.

name: Plant Label (No Plant)
lore: The herb dried up. The label survived.

name: Empty Seed Packet
desc: The seeds were planted. None grew.

name: Clay Pot Shard
desc: From a pot that met the garden path.
lore: It fell. It broke. It is kept.

name: Single Bamboo Stake
lore: The plant it supported wilted first.

name: Zip Tie
desc: One use. This is not it.
lore: Irreversible once used. Kept before use.

name: Dried Blue Tack
lore: Once held a poster. The poster is gone.

name: Rubber Band Ball
desc: Made over years. Serves no purpose.
lore: A monument to not throwing things away.

name: Empty Glasses Case
desc: The glasses found a different home.

name: Lens Cloth
desc: Smears almost as much as it cleans.

name: Empty Contact Lens Case
desc: The lenses are gone. The solution is not.

name: Tiny Spectacles Screw
desc: Falls out of one arm. Loses itself.
lore: Without it, the glasses are lopsided forever.

name: Corn Plaster
desc: A plaster for a very specific foot problem.

name: Blister Dressing
lore: Ready for the walk that hurts.

name: Miniature Sewing Kit
desc: Contains: three threads, one needle, no thimble.

name: Iron-On Patch
desc: Never ironed on. The iron was never got out.
lore: The hole in the trousers remains.

name: Spare Wheel Bolt
desc: For a car you no longer own.
lore: The car is gone. The bolt remains.

name: Mini Windscreen Scraper
desc: Works on a windscreen. Not pockets.
lore: Found in a coat pocket in July.

name: Parking Sensor Cap
lore: The cap fell off. The beeping continued.

name: Oil Dipstick Cap
desc: The oil is being checked. Without this.

name: Valve Cap
desc: From a tyre that may now be flat.
lore: A tiny cap with outsized responsibilities.

name: Spirit Level Bubble Vial
lore: The level is lost. The bubble persists.

name: Old Passport Photo
desc: You look different. You look unhappy.
lore: Passport photos are always like this.

name: Expired Postage Stamp
lore: The postal service has moved on.

name: Return Label (Never Used)
lore: The item was fine. Too fine to return.

name: Cinema Loyalty Card
desc: One stamp short of a free ticket. Always.

name: Supermarket Charity Token
desc: For a charity. The charity year is over.
lore: The cause was good. The timing was not.

name: Losing Scratch Card
lore: It was never going to be a winner.

name: Cloakroom Ticket
desc: The coat was reclaimed. The ticket remained.

name: Broken Coat Check Ticket
desc: Torn badly. The stub is illegible.
lore: The coat is lost. The stub is found.
